title: Class picker appearing after completing a 2D drag selection
capture_instructions: Complete a drag selection in the 2D viewport (release mouse button). The rubber-band rectangle should be gone and points remain highlighted. The class picker panel or floating overlay should be visible, listing classification codes and labels. No class selected yet.
ui_state: 2D drag selection complete, points highlighted in both viewports, class picker visible and awaiting selection

annotations.label: Class picker — list of classification codes
Class picker overlay — click a class to reclassify
Class picker appears here after selection
